title: LunvuPvP
description: LunaPvP enhances combat with smooth FPS, clean HUD, and advanced PvP tools — perfect for competitive players.
body:
# Lunvu PvP
1. Lunvu PvP is a lightweight performance-focused PvP modpack made to make Minecraft run smoother during combat. No gameplay changes, no new content, just improved performance and a cleaner feel.This pack uses mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, VMP, and C2ME to increase FPS, reduce stutter, and keep your game stable even in busy areas or crystal fights. If your frames drop or your game feels choppy during PvP, this pack helps a lot.
Iris is included for optional shaders, Zoomify offers smooth zoom, and AppleSkin shows hunger and saturation so you always know when to eat. Voice Chat is included for servers that support it. Everything else stays vanilla — same combat, same mechanics, just faster and smoother.
## Features
Higher FPS and smoother performance
Works on low-end and high-end PCs
No gameplay changes
Optional shader support
Simple and clean setup
Great For
Crystal PvP
KitPvP / Duels
Survival PvP servers
Anarchy servers
Regular vanilla play with better performance
Why Ue This Pack
Less lag during fights
Faster chunk loading
Lower input latency
No unnecessary mods
Keeps the vanilla feel
